subcodes.first_line: Humbly and ardently, I supplicate constantly the Abha Kingdom on their behalf, praying that they may be confirmed
subcodes.first_line_orig: من همیشه در حق آنها بملکوت ابهی تضرع و زاری می‌نمایم و طلب تأیید و توفیق
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
